text: Congratulations to you both! This is such wonderful, joyful news, and I couldn't be happier for you. Welcome to parenthood, that wild and beautiful adventure of sleepless nights, tiny socks that go missing, and a love so big it surprises you. Your little one is so lucky to have you. I can't wait to meet them and to watch you grow into this new chapter. Wishing your family health, rest where you can find it, and all the quiet, ordinary moments that turn out to be the ones you treasure most. Sending you so much love.
